text:
# Professional Experience

## Bharat Intern

Role: Data Science Intern.

Duration: July 2023-August 2023.

Location: India.

Sumit built and improved Python-based data solutions for business and analytical workflows. He worked on data handling, automation, debugging, performance optimization, workflow efficiency, and project delivery.

Technologies included Python, data analysis libraries, and automation tools.

The provided knowledge base states that he constructed five Python-based data solutions, improved workflow efficiency by 30%, increased data accuracy by approximately 25%, and accelerated bug resolution by 40%.

He learned practical implementation of data-driven workflows and debugging strategies and worked on software reliability and timeline optimization under deadlines.

## TechnoHacks

Role: Python Developer Intern and Python/Data Science Intern.

Duration: June 2023-July 2023.

Location: India.

Sumit worked on Python projects, data science assignments, frontend interfaces, backend application logic, software architecture, performance, and end-to-end development workflows.

Technologies included Python, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and data analysis tools.
